playbook.intent: Take a newly signed client (or new stakeholder cohort on an existing account) from contract to confident participant in our weekly demo / report / decision loop with no surprises.
playbook.scope: Take a newly signed client (or new stakeholder cohort on an existing account) from contract to confident participant in our weekly demo / report / decision loop with no surprises.

success-criteria.criterion: First full delivery cycle attended by client

stage.name: Client maturity read
stage.intent: Assess how the client likes to work.

tasks.task: Interview the client sponsor on tools, cadence, and decision style
Score the client on PM maturity rubric
Identify the most likely friction points

stage.decision-gate: Advance when maturity is rated and friction list is on paper.

stage.name: Onboarding 1-pager
stage.intent: Document our delivery cadence in their language.

tasks.task: Draft a one-page 'how we work together' explainer
Walk it with the client sponsor

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the client confirms understanding in writing.

stage.name: Tool + access setup

tasks.task: Provision client access to the board + dashboard

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the client logs in and verifies they see the right data.

stage.name: Run the first cadence
stage.intent: Walk through one full delivery week.

tasks.task: Run a kickoff demo + first weekly report cycle
Hold one decision-loop meeting with the client

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the client engages with all three rituals.

stage.name: Lock change-control

tasks.task: Explain the change-control process with examples
Run one practice change request through the loop
Confirm the procurement/contract path for change orders

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the client has filed at least one mock CR.

stage.name: Two-week confidence check
stage.intent: Confirm the client can self-serve into our cadence.

tasks.task: Survey the sponsor on confidence + clarity
Note any rituals they want changed
Lock the second-week cadence as the steady state

stage.decision-gate: Required: a written 'confident' verdict from the client sponsor.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content client-onboarding-into-our-delivery-cadence-two-weeks --format md, agent: faion get-content client-onboarding-into-our-delivery-cadence-two-weeks --format context, json: faion get-content client-onboarding-into-our-delivery-cadence-two-weeks --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
